jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners!
